datasets.name: Immune Defense Shot
datasets.text:
Immune Defense Shot (brand: SampleBrand). Form: Liquid shot, 60 ml.

Ingredients: Vitamin C 1000 mg; Zinc 15 mg.

Label claim: supports immune function.

datasets.name: Ginger Turmeric Shot
datasets.text:
Ginger Turmeric Shot (brand: SampleBrand). Form: Liquid shot, 59 ml.

Ingredients: Ginger extract 500 mg; Turmeric 400 mg; Black pepper extract 5 mg.

Label claim: supports digestion and a healthy inflammatory response.

datasets.name: Vitamin D3 K2 Shot
datasets.text:
Vitamin D3 K2 Shot (brand: SampleBrand). Form: Liquid shot, 30 ml.

Ingredients: Vitamin D3 2000 IU; Vitamin K2 100 mcg.

Label claim: supports bone health and immunity.

datasets.name: B-Complex Energy Shot
datasets.text:
B-Complex Energy Shot (brand: SampleBrand). Form: Liquid shot, 60 ml.

Ingredients: Vitamin B1 1.5 mg; Vitamin B2 1.7 mg; Niacin 20 mg; Vitamin B6 2 mg; Vitamin B12 6 mcg.

Label claim: supports energy metabolism and the nervous system.

datasets.name: Focus Shot L-Theanine Caffeine
datasets.text:
Focus Shot (brand: SampleBrand). Form: Liquid shot, 60 ml.

Ingredients: L-Theanine 200 mg; Caffeine from green tea 100 mg.

Label claim: supports focus and alertness.

datasets.name: Magnesium Calm Shot
datasets.text:
Magnesium Calm Shot (brand: SampleBrand). Form: Liquid shot, 60 ml.

Ingredients: Magnesium glycinate 200 mg.

Label claim: supports relaxation, sleep and muscle function.

datasets.name: Ashwagandha Stress Shot
datasets.text:
Ashwagandha Stress Shot (brand: SampleBrand). Form: Liquid shot, 60 ml.

Ingredients: Ashwagandha KSM-66 600 mg.

Label claim: adaptogen, supports stress resilience.

datasets.name: Recovery NAC Electrolyte Shot
datasets.text:
Recovery Shot (brand: SampleBrand). Form: Liquid shot, 100 ml.

Ingredients: N-Acetyl Cysteine 600 mg; Vitamin B1 50 mg; Electrolytes (sodium, potassium, magnesium).

Label claim: supports hydration and recovery.

datasets.name: Electrolyte Hydration Shot
datasets.text:
Electrolyte Hydration Shot (brand: SampleBrand). Form: Liquid shot, 100 ml.

Ingredients: Sodium 200 mg; Potassium 200 mg; Magnesium 60 mg; Chloride 300 mg.

Label claim: supports hydration during sport.

datasets.name: Marine Collagen Beauty Shot
datasets.text:
Marine Collagen Beauty Shot (brand: SampleBrand). Form: Liquid shot, 50 ml.

Ingredients: Marine collagen 5000 mg; Vitamin C 80 mg.

Label claim: supports skin and joints.

datasets.name: Rhodiola Ginseng Energy Shot
datasets.text:
Rhodiola Ginseng Shot (brand: SampleBrand). Form: Liquid shot, 60 ml.

Ingredients: Rhodiola rosea 200 mg; Panax ginseng 100 mg.

Label claim: adaptogens, support endurance.

datasets.name: Elderberry Echinacea Shot
datasets.text:
Elderberry Echinacea Shot (brand: SampleBrand). Form: Liquid shot, 60 ml.

Ingredients: Elderberry extract 1000 mg; Echinacea 200 mg; Vitamin C 100 mg.

Label claim: supports immune defense.
